target: Ah. You finally made it. Shin-chan!!
You're late~~. I was getting worried, you know!
Sorry. My stomach suddenly started hurting...
See? It's definitely the big one after all!!
(Hitogashima has a deeply rooted belief in drifting gods, where it's said that deities reside in objects that wash ashore from the sea.)
(On the island, they call it Hiruko-sama, and it's worshipped as the god of fishing.)
(Therefore, any flotsam that washes ashore is gathered instead of being thrown away as trash...)
(And twice a year, in summer and winter, they hold a ceremony called "<color=#GF_TIPS_070>Umi-okuri</color>" to burn them and return the god to the sea.)
(As expected, a huge number of people have gathered. There must be roughly a thousand people on the shrine grounds.)
It's been a really long time since we all watched the Umi-okuri together like this.
Ah... that's what you meant... Right...
(Ushio... To think she'd lost her memories as a Shadow...)
(It'd be a big help if her head went back to normal, but...)
Huh? Where are Mio and Sou!?
My brother... He's apparently planning to confess to Mio today.
Didn't he confess twice in the past and get rejected, that guy?
Yes... He says third time's the charm...
I love my brother, but he can be so illogical.
But sometimes, unscientific things do happen...
...Yes. But that's not going to happen.
Because! Mio-- already has someone else she likes.
I-I'm sorry... It's not really my place... to say...!!
No, Mio!! This might not be the right time to say this, but!
But... Because it's a time like this, let me say it.
I really do like you, Mio! Th-Therefore!!
Please... let me protect you, Mio!
Wait!! Sou-kun, hold on... What are you saying... eh!?
...What's so good about someone like me...
I'm happy about your feelings... But, I'm sorry. I want to stay good friends with you, Sou-kun!
You showed me somethin' real good!!!!
(I told her not to come out, didn't I...? That idiot!!!!)
Ugh... I'm not Ushio or anything!!
Shinpei... I was busted in a second...
Idiot... Did you really think that counted as a transformation...
Sorry... I just really wanted to see... everyone's faces...
Mio, did Toki-chan help you put on that yukata?
What are you doing, Shin-chan!! Hurry, get away from that thing!!
I'm not letting go of this one.
Ow... my arm, it hurts... Shin...pei?
*Sigh*... honestly... think about it from a bird's-eye view, would you...
Of course we'd get found out. There's no way to replace someone whose funeral has already been held.
From the very start, you... You never meant to switch places, did you?
Why won't you listen? Don't tell me... you can't hear my voice?
